Class UnknownCoordinateSystemClass

ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry

ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll
[ClassInterface(ClassInterfaceType.None)]
[Guid("B286C06B-0879-11D2-AACA-00C04FA33C20")]

Sample Snippet

ConstructFromEnvelope(IEnvelope) 

virtual void ConstructFromEnvelope(IEnvelope pEnvelope)

Parameters

pEnvelope IEnvelope

ConstructFromHorizon()

Defines the XY resolution and domain extent of this spatial reference based on the extent of its horizon. Low precision SRs will have minimum resolution of 1/10mm in current units.

virtual void ConstructFromHorizon()

bool

IsHighPrecision

TRUE if a high precision integer grid is being used to round coordinate values. The scale factors of the spatial reference are re-scaled when this property is changed.

virtual bool IsHighPrecision { get; set; }

Returns

bool

MResolution

The M, or measure, resolution of this spatial reference.

virtual double MResolution { get; set; }

Returns

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

MTolerance

The tolerance used to determine equality of M values.

virtual double MTolerance { get; set; }

Returns

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

MToleranceValid

Returns true if the M tolerance is well defined (not NaN) and >= the minimum M tolerance.

virtual esriSRToleranceEnum MToleranceValid { get; }

Returns

esriSRToleranceEnum

Examples

Sample Snippet

The name of this spatial reference component.

virtual string Name { get; }

Returns

string

virtual string Remarks { get; }

Returns

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Save(IStream, int) 

virtual void Save(IStream pstm, int fClearDirty)

Parameters

pstm IStream
fClearDirty int

SetDefaultMResolution()

Sets the m coordinate grid resolution to 1 mm for a low precision spatial reference or 1/10 mm for a high precision spatial reference.

virtual void SetDefaultMResolution()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetDefaultMTolerance()

Sets the default tolerance used to determine equality of M values (2.0 * m resolution).

virtual void SetDefaultMTolerance()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetDefaultXYResolution()

defaults: PCS(hi): 1/10 mm; PCS(lo): 1 mm; GCS(hi): 1/10,000 arc-second; GCS(lo): 1/500 arc-second; UCS(hi): 1/10 mm (assumed); UCS(lo): 1 mm (assumed).

virtual void SetDefaultXYResolution()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetDefaultXYTolerance()

Sets the default cluster tolerance used to control point coalescing in the X and Y dimensions (the equivalent of 1 mm in the current spatial reference units).

virtual void SetDefaultXYTolerance()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetDefaultZResolution()

Sets the z coordinate grid resolution to 1 mm for a low precision spatial reference or 1/10 mm for a high precision spatial reference.

virtual void SetDefaultZResolution()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetDefaultZTolerance()

Sets the default value for the Z cluster tolerance used to control point coalescing strictly along the Z axis (the equivalent of 1 mm in the current vertical coordinate system units).

virtual void SetDefaultZTolerance()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetDomain(double, double, double, double)

Set the xy domain extent.

virtual void SetDomain(double XMin, double XMax, double YMin, double YMax)

Parameters

XMin double
XMax double
YMin double
YMax double

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetFalseOriginAndUnits(double, double, double)

Set the false origin and units.

virtual void SetFalseOriginAndUnits(double falseX, double falseY, double xyUnits)

Parameters

falseX double
falseY double
xyUnits double

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetMDomain(double, double)

Set the measure domain extent.

virtual void SetMDomain(double inMMin, double inMMax)

Parameters

inMMin double
inMMax double

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetMFalseOriginAndUnits(double, double)

Set the measure false origin and units.

virtual void SetMFalseOriginAndUnits(double falseM, double mUnits)

Parameters

falseM double
mUnits double

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetMinimumMTolerance()

Sets the minimum tolerance (i.e., pre 9.2) used to determine equality of M values (2.0 * m resolution).

virtual void SetMinimumMTolerance()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetMinimumXYTolerance()

Sets the xy cluster tolerance to be 2.0 * resolution. Use this value for compatibility with pre-9.2 topological and relational operators.

virtual void SetMinimumXYTolerance()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetMinimumZTolerance()

Sets the minimum value for the Z cluster tolerance (i.e., pre 9.2) used to control point coalescing strictly along the Z axis (the equivalent of 1 mm in the current vertical coordinate system units).

virtual void SetMinimumZTolerance()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetZDomain(double, double)

Set the z domain extent.

virtual void SetZDomain(double inZMin, double inZMax)

Parameters

inZMin double
inZMax double

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetZFalseOriginAndUnits(double, double)

Set the Z false origin and units.

virtual void SetZFalseOriginAndUnits(double falseZ, double zUnits)

Parameters

falseZ double
zUnits double

Examples

Sample Snippet

SpatialReferenceImpl

SpatialReferenceImpl.

virtual long SpatialReferenceImpl { get; }

Returns

long

Examples

Sample Snippet

UsePrecision

Returns TRUE if the precision information can be used for snapping.

virtual bool UsePrecision { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

XYResolution[bool]

The XY resolution (distance in SR units between distinguishable grid points) of this spatial reference. Reported in meters for PCS/UCS and degrees for GCS when bStandardUnits is true or in current units of SR when it is false.

virtual double XYResolution[bool bStandardUnits] { get; set; }

Parameters

bStandardUnits bool

Returns

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

XYTolerance

The xy tolerance used to control point coalescing in the X and Y dimensions.

virtual double XYTolerance { get; set; }

Returns

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

XYToleranceValid

Returns esriSRToleranceOK if the XY tolerance is well defined (not NaN) and >= the minimum XY tolerance.

virtual esriSRToleranceEnum XYToleranceValid { get; }

Returns

esriSRToleranceEnum

Examples

Sample Snippet

ZCoordinateUnit

The unit for the Z coordinate.

virtual ILinearUnit ZCoordinateUnit { get; set; }

Returns

ILinearUnit

Examples

Sample Snippet

ZResolution[bool]

The Z resolution (height/depth distance between distinguishable grid points) of this spatial reference. Reported in meters when bStandardUnits is true or in current units of SR when it is false.

virtual double ZResolution[bool bStandardUnits] { get; set; }

Parameters

bStandardUnits bool

Returns

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

ZToXYFactor

Conversion factor from Z units to XY units.

virtual double ZToXYFactor { get; }

Returns

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

ZTolerance

The tolerance used to control point coalescing strictly along the Z axis.

virtual double ZTolerance { get; set; }

Returns

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

ZToleranceValid

Returns true if the Z tolerance is well defined (not NaN) and >= the minimum Z tolerance.

virtual esriSRToleranceEnum ZToleranceValid { get; }

Returns

esriSRToleranceEnum

Examples

Sample Snippet
